hero.title: GEO AI
hero.subtitle: Open-source AI Search Optimization
hero.description: Generate llms.txt, AI crawler rules and metadata to make your site visible to AI search engines.

generate.title: Generate llms.txt
generate.description: Create a structured file that tells AI systems about your site content and capabilities.

crawler.title: Configure AI crawler rules
crawler.description: Define how AI crawlers should interact with your site and what content to index.

metadata.title: Add AI metadata
metadata.description: Enrich your pages with metadata that AI search engines understand and prioritize.

signals.title: Provide structured signals
signals.description: Send clear signals to AI systems so they surface your content accurately.

quickstart.title: Quick Start
quickstart.description: Get up and running in seconds.

spec.title: GEO Specification
spec.description: A set of structured signals that make your website visible and accurately represented in AI-powered search engines.

llms.title: llms.txt
llms.description: A structured file that describes your site to large language models, helping them understand your content and services.

metadata.title: AI metadata
metadata.description: Semantic markup and meta tags that provide AI search engines with rich, structured information about your pages.

crawler.title: Crawler rules
crawler.description: Configuration directives that control how AI crawlers access, index, and represent your site content.

signals.title: Structured signals
signals.description: Machine-readable data formats that help AI systems accurately surface and cite your content in responses.

ecosystem.title: Platform Ecosystem
ecosystem.description: AI search optimization tools for every platform. Choose the right integration for your stack.

core.title: GEO AI Core
core.description: TypeScript engine for AI search optimization

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: All GEO AI tools are open source. Explore the repositories, contribute, and help shape the future of AI search optimization.

footer.copyright: © 2026 GEO AI · Open Source · GPL-2.0 License

analyze.title: AI Search Analyzer
analyze.description: Check how visible your site is to AI search engines.
analyze.scope: Analyze llms.txt, AI metadata, crawler rules, and structured signals.
analyze.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. example.com)
analyze.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
analyze.comingSoon: Analysis feature coming soon. Stay tuned.
